positive: A mystical forest scene captured at twilight. Two stylized, silhouetted figures, one graceful and one powerful, stand beneath the roots of an enormous, bioluminescent tree. The forest floor is covered in glowing flora and gentle mist. Use a high contrast, deep jewel-toned color palette (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple). Composition must be centered, with the figures forming a strong, easily distinguishable visual anchor. Emphasize clean lines, dramatic shadows, and a seamless pattern repeat capability. Style: Modern mystical illustration, vector aesthetic, woodcut engraving quality, suitable for screen printing. Cinematic lighting, volumetric fog, intricate detail.
negative: blurry, text, logo, watermark, signature, lowres, artifacts, disfigured, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, noisy, gradient, cartoon, realism
